videos.title: Longest Tunnel in the world above 10,000 feet - ATAL TUNNEL, ROHTANG
videos.description: Atal Tunnel, Rohtang is a highway tunnel built under the Rohtang Pass in the eastern Pir Panjal range of the Himalayas on the ...

comments.author: @pujabiswas6532
comments.text:
Very informative...to the point narration...👍
 Thanks Himbus... Love your channel.. So much of information..❤
Now tourist can travel easily...and also people of upper region don't need to get cut off for almost half a year...their life will be a little bit easier... All thanks to Atal Tunnel...👏
It took around 48 years to get it done...🙁 A very long time period..Thanks to Indira Gandhi Ji for at least taking the initiative...🙏
